---
title: "Copernicus DEM"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: DataAccessPlan, MetaData, CopernicusDEM
using Dates
```

The [Copernicus DEM](https://copernicus-dem-30m.s3.amazonaws.com/readme.html) is a global
Digital Elevation Model derived from the TanDEM-X mission.  Tiles are served as Cloud Optimized
GeoTIFFs (COG) from AWS S3 — no API key required.

Two resolutions are available:

| Product | Resolution | Tile size |
|---------|-----------|-----------|
| GLO-30  | ~30 m (10 arc-sec) | ~25 MB/tile |
| GLO-90  | ~90 m (30 arc-sec) | ~3 MB/tile |

Each tile covers a 1°×1° area, identified by its southwest corner.  For a given spatial extent,
all overlapping tiles are downloaded.

```{julia}
MetaData(CopernicusDEM())
```

## Basic Usage

```julia
using GeoInterface.Extents: Extent

# 30 m resolution (default)
plan = DataAccessPlan(CopernicusDEM(), (-105.0, 40.0))
files = fetch(plan)

# 90 m resolution (smaller files, faster downloads)
plan = DataAccessPlan(CopernicusDEM(resolution=90),
    Extent(X=(-106.0, -104.0), Y=(39.0, 41.0)))
files = fetch(plan)
```

## Options

| Keyword | Type | Default | Description |
|---------|------|---------|-------------|
| `resolution` | `Int` | `30` | Tile resolution: `30` (GLO-30) or `90` (GLO-90) |
| `variables` | `Vector{Symbol}` | `[:elevation]` | Variables (only `:elevation` available) |

## Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `elevation` | Elevation above sea level (m) |

## Loading Raster Data

`fetch` returns file paths to GeoTIFF files.  To load them as raster data, install the
`Rasters` package:

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("Rasters")

using Rasters
files = fetch(plan)
r = Raster(files[1])
```
